plan.title: Waveplan Schema-Compatible Plan Authoring Implementation
notes: Goal: Add deterministic plan-authoring capabilities (new/init/add/remove/get/validate/suggest_questions/list) that emit and preserve files fully compatible with waveplan-plan-schema.json and existing runtime execution tools.
Architecture: Keep execution-state behavior intact (waveplan_* tools) and add a separate authoring service layer in Go.
Persist schema-required plan JSON unchanged, while storing concurrency/idempotency/audit metadata in sidecars so output remains schema-valid.
Expose new authoring MCP tools from main.go, then proxy them via waveplan-cli wp plan ... commands.
Tech stack: Go 1.26, mcp-go, standard library JSON/file I/O, JSON schema-compatible strict decode/validation, table-driven tests with go test.

Design boundary: main.go stays MCP transport + current runtime tools. internal/planedit/* owns authoring logic, validation, locking, sidecars. waveplan-cli remains thin transport proxy with new subcommands only.

T1.title: Add Plan Authoring Types and Strict Schema Decode

T2.title: Implement Schema-Level Validation (IDs, kinds, deps, refs)

T3.title: Add Graph Validation and Deterministic Wave/Depth Recompute

T4.title: Add Sidecar Control Store (Revision, Idempotency, Audit)

T6.title: Expose New MCP Tools in main.go

T7.title: Extend waveplan-cli with wp plan ... Authoring Commands

T10.title: Add Determinism and Conflict Tests for Authoring Surface

T11.title: Add 16k Context Fit Classification and Budget Reporting

Input JSON for missing sections test: {"units":{},"tasks":{}}

notes: Expected: FAIL with undefined DecodePlanStrict
This is the red phase of TDD — verify tests compile but fail

T1.3.title: Implement schema-compatible types and strict decoder
notes: Create internal/planedit/types.go

PlanFile struct: SchemaVersion (int, omitempty), GeneratedOn (string, omitempty), Plan (map[string]any, omitempty), Units (map[string]PlanUnit), Tasks (map[string]map[string]any), DocIndex (map[string]DocRef), FpIndex (map[string]string), Waves ([]WaveDecl, omitempty)
PlanUnit struct: Task, Title, Kind, Wave, PlanLine, DependsOn ([]string), DocRefs ([]string, omitempty), FpRefs ([]string, omitempty), Notes ([]string, omitempty), Command (string, omitempty)
DocRef struct: Path (string), Line (int), Kind (string)
WaveDecl struct: Wave (int), Units ([]string)
DecodePlanStrict: uses json.NewDecoder with DisallowUnknownFields(), validates Units/Tasks/DocIndex/FpIndex are non-nil
Import: bytes, encoding/json, fmt

T1.4.title: Re-run tests
notes: Expected: PASS
Both strict decode tests should pass

T1.5.command: git add internal/planedit/types.go internal/planedit/types_test.go && git commit -m "feat(planedit): add schema-compatible plan types and strict decoder"
notes: Commit message: feat(planedit): add schema-compatible plan types and strict decoder
Files: internal/planedit/types.go, internal/planedit/types_test.go

T2.3.title: Implement validation and stable error codes
notes: Create internal/planedit/validate.go
unitIDRe regex: ^[A-Z][0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)$
allowedKind map: impl, test, verify, doc, refactor → true
Validation checks per unit: ID pattern, kind enum, required fields (Task, Title, PlanLine>0, Wave>0), parent task exists in Tasks map, all depends_on units exist
Error codes: SCHEMA_VIOLATION for ID/kind/field issues, DEP_VIOLATION for missing parent/dep references
Return *DomainError on first validation failure
Import: fmt, regexp

notes: Expected: FAIL with undefined RecomputeWaves
Red phase of TDD

T3.3.title: Implement topo sort + wave recompute
notes: Create internal/planedit/graph.go
Algorithm: BFS topological sort using in-degree counting
Build in-degree map and adjacency list from depends_on
Queue starts with all zero in-degree nodes (roots)
Root nodes (no deps) get wave=1
Non-root nodes: wave = max(wave(dep) for dep in depends_on) + 1
Update p.Units[id].Wave with computed wave
Cycle detection: if seen != len(p.Units) after BFS, return CYCLE_DETECTED error
Empty graph with no units: no error (valid empty plan)
Error code: CYCLE_DETECTED with message 'no root nodes' or 'visited X of Y nodes'
Import: fmt

T3.4.title: Re-run graph tests
notes: Expected: PASS
Both wave recompute tests should pass

T3.5.title: Commit T3
T3.5.command: git add internal/planedit/graph.go internal/planedit/graph_test.go && git commit -m "feat(planedit): add deterministic topo validation and wave recompute"
notes: Commit message: feat(planedit): add deterministic topo validation and wave recompute
Files: internal/planedit/graph.go, internal/planedit/graph_test.go

T4.3.title: Implement control sidecar model and audit append
notes: Create internal/planedit/store.go
NewControlState(): Revision=1, Idempotency=empty map
CheckAndBump(expected): if expected!=Revision return error REVISION_MISMATCH with Retryable=true, else increment and return new revision
Remember(op, key, payloadHash, result): stores under key op:key
Replay(op, key, payloadHash): returns (result, true) if key exists and hash matches, (nil, false) if not found, (error map, true) if hash mismatch (IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSED)
AppendAuditJSONL(path, event): opens file with O_APPEND|O_CREATE|O_WRONLY, mode 0o600, marshals event to JSON, appends with newline
Import: encoding/json, fmt, os

T4.4.title: Re-run store tests
notes: Expected: PASS
Both revision and idempotency tests should pass

T9.3.title: Implement all remaining service operations
notes: Modify internal/planedit/service.go
InitElement struct: TaskID, Task, Title, Kind, DependsOn (from JSON)
InitPlanFromJSON(planID, blob): unmarshal tasks from blob, load plan, add units with Wave=1/PlanLine=1, call RecomputeWaves + ValidatePlanSchemaCompatible, save, return task count
AddTasks(planID, elems): load plan, check duplicates, add units, call RecomputeWaves + Validate, save, return added IDs

RemoveTask(planID, taskID, mode): load plan, check exists, find dependents, strict mode fails if dependents, cascade deletes dependents, relink removes dep from dependents, call RecomputeWaves + Validate, save, return impacted IDs
GetPlan(planID): load and return plan
ListPlans(): glob *execution-waves.json, sort, return paths
LoadPlan(planID): read file, DecodePlanStrict, return plan+path
SavePlan(planID, p): marshal indent, write file 0o600

Modify main.go: add handler functions for each tool, delegate to planedit.Service methods

Modify waveplan-cli: add plan_init (plan_id, elements_blob), plan_add_task (plan_id, elements_blob), plan_rem_task (plan_id, task_id, --mode default strict), plan_get (plan_id), plan_list (no args), plan_suggest_questions (partial_json)

setupAuthoringServerFixture(t): creates temp dir, writes schema-compatible stub plan file including schema_version:1 plus required empty sections, creates WaveplanServer
extractToolText(t, res): extracts Text from Content[0], fails if missing or wrong type

T10.3.title: Implement deterministic envelope and idempotency checks in handlers
notes: Modify main.go
ok(data any): marshals {ok: true, data: data} to JSON, returns mcp.NewToolResultText
fail(code, msg string, details map[string]any): marshals {ok: false, error: {code, message, retryable: code==REVISION_MISMATCH, details}} to JSON, returns mcp.NewToolResultText
All authoring handlers use ok() for success, fail() for errors
Idempotency: check idempotency_key in args, call ControlState.Replay before executing, if hit return cached result
Revision check: check expected_revision in args, call ControlState.CheckAndBump, if mismatch return fail(REVISION_MISMATCH, ...)

T10.4.title: Re-run deterministic test set
notes: Expected: PASS
All deterministic envelope and idempotency tests should pass
